name: Elliptic Blockchain Intelligence API
what_it_does: Blockchain intelligence and compliance API for AML/KYC screening of cryptocurrency wallets and transactions — providing real-time risk scoring, sanctions checking, and transaction monitoring for exchanges, custodians, and financial institutions.
use_cases: Screening cryptocurrency wallet addresses for AML risk before onboarding customers
Monitoring ongoing transaction flows for suspicious activity in real-time
Checking transactions against OFAC and global sanctions lists for compliance
Building automated crypto compliance workflows for exchange risk management
Generating VASP compliance reports for regulatory audit purposes
not_for: Non-compliance cryptocurrency analytics (use Dune or Flipside for analytics)
Consumer wallet applications without compliance requirements
Jurisdictions without crypto AML regulations (all major jurisdictions require this)
best_when: A regulated crypto platform or financial institution needs API-driven AML screening of cryptocurrency wallets and transactions for compliance automation.
avoid_when: You need blockchain analytics without compliance requirements — Elliptic is specifically for regulated compliance use cases.

auth.notes: API key and HMAC request signing for security. Strong auth model for sensitive compliance data. Key rotation recommended. Account-scoped access with request signing per call.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise pricing only
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription based on screening volume; contact sales
pricing.notes: Enterprise compliance pricing. Annual contracts typical. Competitive with Chainalysis for crypto AML. Pricing scales with transaction volume and chains screened. Primarily UK-based.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per subscription tier; bulk screening available

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documented for screening and monitoring operations. SDK available for Python and Node.js. Error responses include compliance-relevant error codes. Webhook delivery for ongoing monitoring alerts.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Wallet screening reads are idempotent (returns current risk score). Alert creation is idempotent by wallet address. Transaction monitoring enrollment is idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: HMAC request signing adds implementation complexity for agents
Risk scores can change over time as new intelligence is added — rescan periodically
Screening coverage varies by blockchain — verify chain support before deployment
Enterprise approval required before API access — not self-service

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR. HMAC request signing provides strong auth. TLS enforced. EU and US data residency. Handles sensitive compliance data — high security standards required and met. Regulatory compliance is core product.
